mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member SELECT 'pcwk'|| LEVEL AS user_id, '이상무'||MOD(LEVEL,10) AS name, '4321a' AS password, level AS login, MOD(level,50) AS recommend, 'tnalsl'||level||'@naver.com' AS email, MOD(level,3)+1 AS grade, SYSDATE - LEVEL/60 AS reg_dt FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= #{saveCount}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, name, password, login, recommend, email, DECODE(grade,1,'BASIC' ,2,'SILVER' ,3,'GOLD') grade, TO_CHAR(reg_dt,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') reg_dt FROM member ORDER BY user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, password = #{password}, login = #{login}, recommend = #{recommend}, email = #{email}, grade = DECODE(#{grade},'BASIC',1 ,'SILVER',2 ,'GOLD',3), reg_dt = SYSDATE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, name, password, login, recommend, email, DECODE(grade,1,'BASIC' ,2,'SILVER' ,3,'GOLD') grade, TO_CHAR(reg_dt,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') reg_dt FROM member WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt FROM member
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( user_id, name, password, login, recommend, email, grade, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{password}, #{login}, #{recommend}, #{email}, DECODE(#{grade},'BASIC',1 ,'SILVER',2 ,'GOLD',3), SYSDATE )
